target_test: Composition is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'compose' -> 'composition', a measured agent-orchestration domain, but capabilities:[composition] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add a Composition union case + parse arm.

target_test: Delegation is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'delegate' -> 'delegation' and AgentOrchestrator delegates work, but capabilities:[delegation] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add a Delegation union case + parse arm.

target_test: Orchestration is a first-class agent skill
rationale: GapDetection tags 'orchestrat' -> 'orchestration' and AgentOrchestrator orchestrates multi-agent runs, but capabilities:[orchestration] parses to AgentSkill.Custom. Add an Orchestration union case + parse arm.
